)]}'

887
[["wrb.fr","rLM1Ne","[[\"TypeScript Fundamentals: A Handbook of Type Systems and Rules\",[[[\"fdfc8ac4-3237-4f2a-8a79-3e24297a7040\"],\"Programming TypeScript Making your JavaScript applications scale (Boris Cherny) (Z-Library).pdf\",[null,87289,[1767921640,565022000],[\"baf1f9cc-7c04-4655-939b-09849052184e\",[1767921648,468111000]],3,null,1],[null,2]],[[\"ddd31154-74a0-484a-a24c-aff796acae2f\"],\"typescript-book.pdf\",[null,22183,[1767921620,707149000],[\"78e4b577-2a9a-4492-a854-735d65782d18\",[1767921622,324942000]],3,null,1],[null,2]]],\"c3f6285f-1709-44c4-9cd6-e95cf0ea4f5e\",\"📘\",null,[1,false,true,null,null,[1768963670,111757000],1,false,[1767921609,87622000],null,null,null,false,true,1,false],null,[[1,\"You are a helpful science tutor\"],[1]],null,[true,true,true],[6,500,300,500000]]]",null,null,null,"generic"],["di",219],["af.httprm",219,"1840925282627034405",10]]
